since_last: 42% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.56%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.04% · BTC -1.19% · Gold +2.22% · Nasdaq100 -0.25%. 42% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.56%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.56%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +23.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +23.06%, DELL +10.70%, HPE +5.74%, CBRS +5.04%, OKLO +4.82%. Laggards: PATH -9.14%, GEV -6.91%, WDAY -4.29%, NOW -4.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.82% at $122.53
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
